name: promptcellar
description: Promptcellar for Claude Code — captures every prompt to .prompts/ in PLF-1 format.

plugins.name: promptcellar
plugins.description: Capture every prompt + outcome (files touched, commits, tokens, cost) to .prompts/ in PLF-1 format. Slash commands: /promptcellar:status, :enable, :disable, :log, :doctor, :version, :uninstall. Includes an MCP server (search/log/touched/session) for the agent to query its own history.
